documents.title: Periodic Transaction Report (278-T) — December 19, 2024
documents.summary: Signed December 19, 2024 as outgoing FEMA Administrator. Discloses 10 transactions on November 20-21, 2024: a Schwab Value Advantage Money Fund (SWVXX) purchase plus sales of Amazon, Meta, Paycom, Autodesk, Palantir, CrowdStrike, Apple, Lululemon and the Invesco QQQ Trust. Sales of Paycom, Autodesk, Palantir, CrowdStrike and Lululemon in the $15,001-$50,000 range; the rest in $1,001-$15,000. All flagged No for late notification.

documents.title: Termination Report (OGE Form 278e)
documents.summary: Termination Report covering the period from prior filing through January 20, 2025 departure date (signed January 13, 2025). Lists no outside positions and a single brokerage IRA holding stocks including Adobe, AMD, Alphabet, Amazon, Apple, Bank of America, Meta, Intuit, Microsoft and NVIDIA — most in the $50K-$100K range, NVIDIA $100K-$250K. Includes a public annotation noting the filer agreed to update reported information if it changed before the termination date.

propublicaCheck.discrepancies: ProPublica's Trump Team Financial Disclosures index was reachable but its individual-appointee detail pages could not be parsed via WebFetch. Criswell was a Biden-administration FEMA Administrator who departed January 20, 2025; she may not appear in ProPublica's Trump Team database. Cross-check deferred.
